channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Sooryavanshi hits maiden 50 as India thump Zimbabwe in T20
item.description: via RFI #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: RFI

item.title: Sooryavanshi smashes maiden half-century as India thump Zimbabwe @Reuters
item.description: via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Teenager Sooryavanshi blasts 50 off 18 as India cruises past Zimbabwe in T20
item.description: via AP News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: How Zimbabwe is Reclaiming its Cultural Heritage through fashion
item.description: via Financial Fortune Media #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Chinese Firms Help Zimbabwe Secure $300 Million for Lithium Mine
item.description: via Bloomberg.com #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Almasi brings global theatre heavyweights to Zimbabwe ahead of Africa Voices Now! 2026 @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Mbulelo Mpofu, Zimbabwe’s performing arts sector is receiving a significant boost this July as Almasi Collaborative Arts hosts two internationally acclaimed theatre and screen professionals for an intensive skills development... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: Vusa Mkhaya humbled by Zimbabwe Achievers Awards Global honour @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Mbulelo Mpofu AUSTRIA-BASED Zimbabwean musician, songwriter, music producer and cultural activist Vusa Mkhaya has described his upcoming honorary recognition at the Zimbabwe Achievers Awards (ZAA) Global Awards 2026 as... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: Madhevere and Nyamhuri return for Zimbabwe’s T20I series against India
item.description: CricInfo Tafadzwa Tsiga, the wicketkeeper-batter, has earned his first T20I call-up, while batting allrounder Wessly Madhevere and fast bowler Newman Nyamhuri have been drafted in for Zimbabwe’s three-match T20I series at home against India. The trio has replaced Clive Madande, T via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: PSL giants avoid each other in Munhumutapa Challenge Cup Round of 32 draw
item.description: Zimbabwe Premier Soccer League heavyweights have avoided facing each other in the Round of 32 of the inaugural ZIFA Munhumutapa Challenge Cup following Wednesday’s draw. The upcoming round will be played on the weekend of 7 to 9 August across the country. Bulawayo giants Highland via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: When Period Pain is Normalised: The Hidden Endometriosis Crisis
item.description: When Pain is Normalised: Inside the Hidden Endometriosis Crisis For generations, Black women have been taught to bear severe pelvic pain with quiet dignity, dismissing debilitating cycles as a normal rite of passage. But what happens when "normal period pain" is actually a chroni via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
